name: Ironveil Syndicate
specialty: Specializing in undercity rift navigation and extraction of rare artifacts from the shattered realms

members.name: Vaelis Ironheart
members.note: A veteran with a scarred face, known for his iron will and unwavering calm in the face of danger

members.name: Zephyr Nightshade
members.note: A silent and stealthy figure, rumored to have a personal vendetta against the Serpent Choir

visual: Clad in sturdy leather armor and armed with an assortment of makeshift weapons, the Ironveil Syndicate are a sight of grim determination, always carrying themselves with a hardened resolve. A distinctive white bandana tied around Vaelis' head marks them as a guild-sanctioned crew in the undercity.
reputation_note: Whispers in the undercity claim that the Ironveil Syndicate is not just another guild-affiliated crew, but a group of highly skilled and well-connected individuals with a reputation for pushing the boundaries of what is considered safe and sane in the city under the dome
history: [2026-03-14] Completed a escort-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
